attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
RSH2.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY AS TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,
STTAC.CONTRACT_NUMBER AS BK_SRC_RPRTD_SRVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
RPROD1.ITEM_KEY AS SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY,
RPROD2.ITEM_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
ELMAP.ALLOCATION_TYPE_NAME AS BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD,
STTAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME AS BK_C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME,
STTAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME AS BK_C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME,
STTAC.SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD AS BK_SRC_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD,
STTAC.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT AS TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT     ,
STTAC.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT AS TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT,
STTAC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT AS TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT,
STTAC.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT AS TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT,
STTAC.DV_TAC_WARRANTY_PCT AS TAC_WARRANTY_PERCENT,
STTAC.DV_TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT AS TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT     ,
STTAC.ENRICHMENT_METHODOLODY_DESC AS BK_ST_ENRCHMNT_MTHDLGY_CD,
STTAC.CONTRACT_NUMBER AS SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
STTAC.FISCAL_MONTH_ID AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT  ,
STTAC.SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_AE_SVC_TAC_COGS_TRIANG STTAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_CM SMK
ON STTAC.SUB_MEASURE_KEY = SMK.SUB_MEASURE_KEY
AND SMK.SUB_MEASURE_NAME = 'TAC SCMS OTHER' --TO FILTER ONLY TAC WARRANTY RECORDS FROM ST AE ONLY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH1
ON(STTAC.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH2
ON(STTAC.DRV_SALES_TERRITORY_CODE = RSH2.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE) 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_GL_TRIANG_ID_MAP ELMAP
ON(ELMAP.TRIANGULATION_ID = STTAC.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_ME  RPROD1
ON(RPROD1.BK_PRODUCT_ID = STTAC.SERVICE_PRODUCT_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_ME RPROD2
ON(RPROD2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = STTAC.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID)

SELECT
TAC.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE          ,
TAC.DRV_SALES_TERRITORY_CODE,
TAC.SERVICE_PRODUCT_ID            ,
TAC.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID              ,
TAC.FISCAL_MONTH_ID               ,
TAC.C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME      ,
TAC.C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME   ,
TAC.TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT     ,
TAC.TAC_THTR_BIZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT,
TAC.TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT      ,
TAC.TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT     ,
TAC.DV_TAC_WARRANTY_PCT           ,
TAC.DV_TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT  ,
TAC.SOURCE_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD,
TAC.CONTRACT_NUMBER               ,
TAC.ENRICHMENT_METHODOLODY_DESC   ,
TAC.CREATE_USER                   ,
TAC.CREATE_DATETIME               ,
TAC.UPDATE_USER                   ,
TAC.UPDATE_DATETIME               ,
TAC.BEHAVIOR_ID                   ,
TAC.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID         ,
TAC.SUB_MEASURE_KEY               ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_AE_SVC_TAC_COGS_TRIANG TAC
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_CM SMK
ON TAC.SUB_MEASURE_KEY = SMK.SUB_MEASURE_KEY
AND SMK.SUB_MEASURE_NAME = 'TAC SCMS OTHER' --TO FILTER ONLY TAC WARRANTY RECORDS FROM ST AE ONLY
WHERE NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH1 
WHERE TAC.SALES_TERRITORY_CODE = RSH1.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ) 
OR NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_SALES_HIERARCHY_ME RSH2
WHERE TAC.DRV_SALES_TERRITORY_CODE = RSH2.SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE ) 
OR NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_GL_TRIANG_ID_MAP ELMAP 
WHERE  ELMAP.TRIANGULATION_ID = TAC.TRIANGULATION_TYPE_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_ME  RPROD1
WHERE RPROD1.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TAC.SERVICE_PRODUCT_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS(SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_ME RPROD2
WHERE RPROD2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = TAC.GOODS_PRODUCT_ID )

SELECT 
ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY,
BK_SRC_RPRTD_SRVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY           ,
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY             ,
BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD      ,
BK_C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME ,
BK_C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME,
BK_SRC_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD,
SUM(TAC_BACKBONE_COST_USD_AMT     ),
SUM(TAC_THTR_BUZ_OPRTN_CST_USD_AMT),
SUM(TAC_OUT_TASKING_COST_AMT      ),
SUM(TAC_OVERHEAD_COST_USD_AMT     ),
TAC_WARRANTY_PERCENT          ,
TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT     ,
BK_ST_ENRCHMNT_MTHDLGY_CD,
SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY,
0.00 AS WORK_TIME_IN_MINS_CNT,
DATE AS EDW_CREATE_DTM     ,           
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER     ,          
DATE AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM       ,         
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER       ,        
'I' AS ACTION_CODE            ,       
'I' AS DML_TYPE                    
FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_TECH_ASST_CTR_CGS 
GROUP BY 
ORIGINAL_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY  ,
TRIANGULATED_SALES_TERR_KEY   ,
BK_SRC_RPRTD_SRVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY           ,
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY             ,
BK_TRIANGULATION_TYPE_CD      ,
BK_C3_CUSTOMER_THEATER_NAME   ,
BK_C3_CUST_MARKET_SEGMENT_NAME,
BK_SRC_REPORTED_TAC_COUNTRY_CD,
BK_ST_ENRCHMNT_MTHDLGY_CD     ,
SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUM          ,
BK_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT ,
TAC_WARRANTY_PERCENT          ,
TAC_ADJUSTED_OVERHEAD_PCT,
SERVICE_REQUEST_TAC_COST_KEY,
WORK_TIME_IN_MINS_CNT
